overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time marketplace for Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) provider availability, piloted in Ohio Region 13. Built on the Internet Computer Protocol (ICP), it features real-time provider status, a Sentinel Prediction Engine, Fiscal Impact Dashboard, IMAX-style video experience with peer support documentaries, and a comprehensive mobile-first UI/UX.
features: Real-time MAT provider map with MapLibre GL JS and clustering
Sentinel Prediction Engine with NWS weather, Census ACS social stress, payday logic
Fiscal Impact Engine with 7-Attempts model and live Impact Odometer
IMAX-style video experience with peer support documentaries
Recovery Intelligence Dashboard with PDF export
ElevenLabs accessibility integration (text-to-speech, ambient music, multilingual)
Admin workflow with provider verification, emergency bridge toggle, and Prediction Engine panel
NO-PHI policy — no patient data ever stored or transmitted
Provider profiles with Cost Plus Drugs Rx Router and QR code referrals
Cookie consent, privacy policy, terms of service pages
